verses.text: Topa in Moses kiangah
“Israel mite thu pia-in amaute tungah, ‘Keimah hong kibiakna mei tawh a kihal an, a gim namtui keima-a' pen a hunin kei tungah nong piak ding uh phawk un,’ ci-in gen in
“ Topa' tungah na piak ding uh mei tawh kihal biakna in: A sitbaanglo kum khat a pha tuuno nih, tatsat loin biakpiakna-in nisimin na pia ding uh hi
Tuuno khat zingsangin na pia ding uh a, a tuuno khat pen nitakin na pia ding uh hi
An tawh biakna-in oliv thau hai khat tawh a kibawl annel lawh khat na pia ding uh hi
Tua pen Topa' tungah mei tawh kihal biakna, a gim namtui dingin Sinai Mual-ah a kikipsak, a kitatsatlo meihal biakna ahi hi
Leenggahzu tawh a biakna pen tuuno khat ciangin hai khat hi ding hi. Topa' tungah leenggahzucil tawh biakna pen siangtho munah na sung ding uh hi
A tuuno khat nitakin na pia ding uh hi. Zingsanga an tawh biakna leh a leenggahzu tawh biakna mah bangin, mei tawh kihal biakna, Topa' tungah a gim namtui-in na pia ding uh hi.
“Sabbath ni-in a sitbaanglo, kum khat a pha tuuno nih leh an tawh biakna-in sathau tawh a kibawl annel lawh nih leh a leenggahzu tawh biakna hi ding hi
Hih pen tatsat loin meihal biakna leh a leenggahzu tawh biaknate banah Sabbath simin meihal biakna ahi hi
“Kha simin a ni masa ni-in Topa' tungah meihal biakna na pia ding uh hi. Bawngtal nih, tuutal khat, a sitbaanglo kum khat a pha tuuno a pa sagih hi ding hi
Bawngtal khat ciangin an tawh biakna-in sathau tawh a kibawl annel lawh thum zong hi ding hi. A tuutal khat ciangin an tawh biakna-in sathau tawh a kibawl annel lawh nih hi ding hi
Tuuno khat-a' dingin an tawh biakna-in sathau tawh a kibawl annel lawh khat ciat hi ding a, a gim namtui meihal biakna ding ahi hi

Leenggahzu tawh a biaknate pen, bawngtal khat ciangin leenggahzu thawl lang, tuutal khat ciangin leenggahzu hai nih, tuuno khat ciangin leenggahzu hai khat hi ding hi. Hihte pen kum khat sunga om kha simin meihal biakna ahi hi
Khialhna hanga biakna-in Topa' tungah keel a pa khat zong kipia ding hi. Tua pen a kitatsat loin meihal biakna leh a leenggahzu tawh biaknate banah a kipia ding ahi hi.
“Kha masa a ni sawm leh ni li ni pen Topa' Paisan Pawi ni ahi hi
Tua kha a ni sawm leh ni nga ni pen biakna pawi ni hi a, ni sagih sung silngo sawhloh anlum kine ding hi
A ni masa ni-in a siangtho kikhopna khat om ding hi. Tua ni-in leitung nasep na sem kei ding uh a
Topa' tungah meihal biakna na pia ding uh hi. Tuate pen bawngtalno nih, tuutal khat, leh kum khat a pha tuuno a pa sagih hi ding hi. Tuate a sitbaanglo ahih ding thei un
Sathau tawh a kibawl annel ahi an tawh a biaknate zong hi ding hi. Bawngtal khat ciangin annel lawh thum leh tuutal khat ciangin annel lawh nih tawh na pia khawm ding uh hi
Tuuno sagihte khat ciangin annel lawh khat mah tawh na pia khawm ding uh hi
Note-a' dingin kilemna bawlna dingin khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat zong hi ding hi
Meihal biakna ding ahi zingsanga meihal biakna banah tatsat lo-a biakna-in hihte na pia ding uh hi

Tua bangmahin mei tawh kihal an tawh biakna ahi, Topa' tungah a gim namtui, ni sagih sung ni simin na pia ding uh hi. Tua pen a kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna leh leenggahzu tawh a biaknate banah kipia ding hi
A ni sagih ni-in a siangtho kikhopna khat na nei ding uh a, tua ni-in leitung nasep na sem kei ding uh hi
“Na nipikal pawi hunun Topa' tungah an thak tawh biakna na piak hun uh anpal piak ni-in a siangtho kikhopna khat na nei ding uh hi. Tua ni-in leitung nasep na sem kei ding uh a
meihal biakna, Topa' tungah a gim namtui na pia ding uh hi. Bawngtalno nih, tuutal khat, leh kum khat a pha tuuno a pa sagih, a vekpi-in a sitbaanglo hi ding hi
Sathau tawh a kibawl ahi an tawh a biakna dingin zong, bawngtal khat ciangin annel lawh thum, tuutal khat ciangin lawh nih
tuuno sagihte khat ciangin lawh khat tawh na pia khawm ding uh hi
Note-a' dingin kilemna bawlna dingin keel a pa khat zong na pia ding uh hi
A kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna leh an tawh a biaknate banah tuate leh leenggahzu tawh a biakna na pia ding uh hi. Tuate a sitbaanglo ahih ding thei ta un.
